issue_drafts.title: Add contract boundary for helper skill outputs
issue_drafts.summary: Define the minimal artifact contract that lets helper skills produce derived outputs without becoming a new source of truth.
acceptance_checks: Derived issue artifacts state that plan.json owns scope.
Contract anchors are stable headings or omitted.

issue_drafts.title: Decide publication metadata for GitHub issues
issue_drafts.summary: Gather the repository, label, and milestone policy needed before issue drafts can be safely published by an adapter.
issue_drafts.human_blocker: Need target repo and label policy from the operator before any GitHub API call.
acceptance_checks: The discovery output names the publication target and labels, or records that publication is intentionally skipped.
verification_expectations: Confirm no GitHub API call is performed by the to-issues skill itself.

discovery.question: Which repository and label/milestone policy should issue publication use?
discovery.decision_unblocked: Whether a later GitHub adapter may publish these drafts.
